rulings.Rulings: hearing. no courtesy copy and proposed order for the ex parte petition to waive probate referee appraisal received by the probate examiner. no later than 8/11/16, Counsel must e-file a copy of the most recent bank statement for the estate's bank account. counsel should direct the efiling clerk to the note entered on IJS by the examiner that no declaration re retention of the original bank statement is required for this filing. note-->this hearing is on the failure to provide the examiner with the hard copy of the ex parte petition, not on the substance of the underlying petition.
